description:
Your personal research assistant

Zotero is a free, easy-to-use tool to help you collect, organize, annotate, cite, and share research.
Functionality changed or added
- Added hidden preference extensions.zotero.naturalSorting to disable natural sorting (“Collection 2” < “Collection 10”)
Bugs fixed
- Fixed slow performance at startup in some large databases
  - Could result in being stuck on “Loading items…”
- Fixed file downloads via authenticated proxies (since 7.0)
- Reader fixes
  - Fixed broken reader toolbar after converting between highlight and underline annotations
  - Fixed ink eraser not working
  - Fixed page number editing in annotation widget
  - Fixed annotation not updating when dropped on color/tag in the sidebar
  - Prevent DNS/TCP connections for links in snapshots (due to Firefox prefetch behavior)
- Fixed handling of nested HTML tags in tab titles
- [Windows] Fixed red background on search condition tooltip in Advanced Search window
- Fixed edited item fields showing trailing whitespace until refresh
